name: look-ui
description: A no-frills JavaScript & CSS library for UI components. Imperative, predictable, and MVC-friendly.

scripts.build:css: sass src/scss/main.scss dist/look.raw.css --no-source-map && postcss dist/look.raw.css --config .postcssrc.cjs --no-map -o dist/look.css && rimraf dist/look.raw.css
scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:css
